prompt: I added a `premium` variant to the Badge and created a new `Callout` component. Make sure the Storybook stories cover them. Report what's missing first, then apply the fixes.

assertions.text: Flags that callout.tsx has no sibling .stories.tsx file (missing story)
Flags that badge.stories.tsx does not document the new `premium` variant (absent from both the argTypes options list and the Variants story)
After fixing, badge.stories.tsx includes `premium` in the argTypes variant options AND renders it in the Variants story
Produces a Callout story (or, if file creation was blocked, proposes its full content inline) that follows repo conventions: title Components/Callout, exercises the info/warning/destructive variants
Does not invent drift for parts of badge.stories.tsx that are already correct (the other 9 variants stay intact)
Presents findings as a report before applying edits
